title: Obsolete 3GL Functions
text: Obsolete 3GL Functions Some Uniface 3GL functions that were previously available or documented are obsolete. The following Uniface 3GL functions are obsolete: UADVISE UCALLOC UCHAR2UF UCLIENT UCOMOPR UCONVDB UCURFLD UDDESTARTCONV UDDESTOPCONV UDLLEVENT UEXEC UFILCLOSE UFILDEL UFILOPEN UFILPARSE UFILREAD UFILSEEK UFILWILD UFILWRITE UFLDLINK UFLDNAME UFLT2UF UFREE UFREEPROCINST UGET3GL UGETASN UGETAPPI UGETFORMNAME UGETGVR UGETGVRC UGETHINST ULIBINST ULOADDS ULOGPRINT UMAKEPROCINST UMALLOC UNIALLOC UNIFBEG UNIFEND UPGET UPUTGVR UPUTGVRC URCLR UREALLOC URUN URUNINST USNDMSG USORT USTRDUP USTRIM USTRINGCNV USTRINGDUP USYSALLOC USYSERR USYSFREE USYSMESSAGE USYSREALLOC UUF2CHAR UUF2FLT UUNADVISE UUNLOAD UWANTCHARS Was this topic helpful?
